articles.author: Gary Fields
articles.title: At the Great American State Fair, you can find a dinosaur’s rib cage. Unity is another matter - AP News
articles.description: The Great American State Fair has kicked off on the National Mall in Washington. It's run by a group created by President Donald Trump. Visitors can find a 110-foot Ferris wheel, along with farm animals and state-themed exhibits. Some visitors feel the fair i…
articles.content:
WASHINGTON (AP) A dinosaur rib cage. A 7,000-pound sandcastle made with Jersey Shore sand. Two rocking chairs in an unstaffed booth as well as a number of empty spaces.
This is the Great American St… [+4555 chars]

articles.author: Midhat Fatimah
articles.title: US allows partial release of Anthropic's Mythos AI model - DW.com
articles.description: Only a small group of American firms will get access to Anthropic's AI Model Mythos 5, however, it is unclear which companies will be selected.
articles.content: The United States government has authorized Anthropic to release its powerful Claude Mythos 5, an artificial intelligence model, to some "trusted" American cybersecurity firms, the company announced … [+2052 chars]
